title: Nominal Functional Domain Schema
description: Validates closed-class functional elements operating inside or substituting for a Noun Phrase projection (PRON, DET, NUM), managing reference, quantification, or deixis.

pos_payload.description: The morphological and syntactic behavioral payload describing nominal arguments and phrasal modifiers.

functional_scope.description: The baseline operational domain of the token, indicating whether it establishes reference, person identity, numeric quantity, or spacial/discoursal deixis.

token_class.description: The lexical taxonomy of the closed-class token, mapping straight to corresponding UPOS designations.

gender.description: Grammatical or biological gender distinctions encoded directly by the nominal token where applicable.

case.description: Abstract morphosyntactic alignment or case associations bound inherently to the functional word form.

ud_deprel_default.description: The default target dependency relation for this category in a UD syntax tree.

surface_forms.description: List of standard orthographic variations, bound morph variants, or allomorphs representing this entity.

usage_notes.description: Contextual documentation on stylistic conditions, generational registers, or dialect-specific distributions.

structural_constraints.description: Explicit phrasal boundary conditions, required agreement flags, or linear token ordering dependencies for dependency parsing rules.
